    var fn=config.ToString();
    Console.WriteLine(fn);

        var configFile = xmlConfig.AutoReloadFileNames.FirstOrDefault();

        var dd = ((XmlLoggingConfiguration)config).  AutoReloadFileNames.FirstOrDefault();
    }
